steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The decisive clue is the word "praising" combined with the glowing descriptors—"especially pointed," "heartbreaking and inspiring." The critics are expressing approval of these films.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content:
The blank needs a verb meaning to praise — the article is "celebrating films depicting the Black experience," so the critics' action toward Davis's work must be positive recognition.
  • Choice A — inspired: caused something to come into being; critics don't "inspire" an existing work — the work inspires the critics, not the other way around. ✗
  • Choice B — satirized: mocked through ridicule; this is critical/negative, contradicting the article's celebratory framing. ✗
  • Choice C — overlooked: failed to notice or ignored; a celebratory article cannot also overlook the work being celebrated. ✗
  • Choice D — commended: praised or expressed approval; matches the celebratory tone of an article celebrating Black-experience films. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
